role_summary: Serves as a standardized integration adapter within an AI service abstraction layer, encapsulating backend-specific communication protocols into a uniform interface for text generation and conversational workflows.
finding: The system implements a provider pattern to decouple core application logic from specific AI inference engines. It establishes a consistent contract for both single-prompt completion and multi-turn dialogue management, incorporates built-in handling for structured data outputs, and supports dynamic endpoint and model configuration, enabling seamless AI backend substitution and scalable AI integration.
